text:
Jannan is an language used in World of Hunter × Hunter. It was said that due to similarities in grammar, Jannan is almost like a dialect for Gelman language. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 395 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

During Phantom Troupe's flashback, Chrollo states that he learned Jannan language. 

Trivia

Jannan means "Heaven" or "Paradise" in Hausa.
It is likely that either Jannan or Gelman was the language used to write the notes left by the people who murdered Sarasa, as Uvogin apparently couldn’t read them and demanded that Chrollo do so, to which he refused. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 397
